name: codex-orchestrator
description: Codex-native orchestrator plugin for file-backed design, planning, execution tracking, review gates, and document sync.

interface.shortDescription: File-backed orchestration for design, plans, execution, and review gates
interface.longDescription: Codex Orchestrator makes design specs, implementation plans, category routing, runtime state, review gates, and plan synchronization first-class workflow artifacts so long-running work does not drift away from the repository.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Orchestrator to turn this request into a spec, plan, and bounded execution flow.
Review the active implementation plan, sync task progress, and keep repository docs aligned.
Route the next task by category, record runtime state, and enforce review gates before acceptance.
